name: dot
description: Status indicator dot with online, away, busy, offline states and optional animated pulse ring

props.name: pulse
props.description: When true, shows an animated ripple ring; only active for the online status.

examples.label: Example 2
examples.code:
// Pulsing online indicator, larger size
<Dot status="online" size="lg" pulse />

examples.label: Example 3
examples.code:
// Away status, small size
<Dot status="away" size="sm" />

examples.label: Example 4
examples.code:
// Busy status used on a chat list row
<Dot status="busy" />
